title: Phase 13: Workflow, permission, and mobile tests
description: Write workflow tests covering complete business flows (order lifecycle, dispatch flow, delivery flow, collections flow), role/permission tests for every role x every action, import validation tests, and mobile workflow tests for driver PWA, yard, and receiving.
steps: Write workflow tests for order lifecycle: DRAFT -> SUBMITTED -> CONFIRMED -> PICKING -> PICKED -> LOADING -> LOADED -> IN_TRANSIT -> DELIVERED -> COMPLETED
Write workflow tests for dispatch flow: assign orders -> create route -> sequence stops -> dispatch -> track
Write workflow tests for delivery flow: start route -> arrive -> deliver -> capture POD/COD -> complete route
Write workflow tests for collections flow: age -> assign -> call -> promise -> follow up -> resolve
Write role/permission tests: every role x every action (view, create, edit, delete, approve)
Write import validation tests: each import type with good data, bad data, duplicates, partial matches
Write mobile workflow tests for driver PWA (offline/online), yard task flow, receiving workflow
